summary: WIN-012 detail_evidence disturbed-day caveat added via PATCH-303-E. A new sentence after "the coupling constant is undefined." now notes that the −10.9 nT numerator is the storm-day excursion during the October 2003 G5 Halloween storm (Dst = −383 nT), not a quiet-day baseline measurement, so any inferred κ is fitted to a single extreme event. Brings WIN-012 prose into parity with the raw-text WIN-010 entry acknowledgment.
